name: 37signals-way
description: Build lean, opinionated products using the 37signals philosophy from Getting Real, Rework, and Shape Up. Use when the user mentions "Getting Real", "Rework", "Shape Up", "37signals", "Basecamp method", "six-week cycles", "fixed time variable scope", "appetite vs estimates", "betting table", "breadboarding", "fat marker sketch", "build less", "underdo the competition", or "opinionated software". Also trigger when cutting scope to ship faster, running small teams, avoiding long-term roadmaps, or e
author: wondelai
summary_zh: 这是一套基于37signals理念的产品开发指南，适合小团队砍掉臃肿需求、抛弃长线规划以加速交付，帮你打造精简且有态度的软件。
